HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROACH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECCESARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. MICHAEL ROACH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERKS: DLOK; REPORTER: GENA EALES CSR 	176 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROACH'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECCESARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. MICHAEL ROACH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERKS: DLOK; REPORTER: GENA EALES CSR 	176 (206)
